Motivation
When using sglang to deploy LLM in the K8s environment, use the --enable-metrics parameter to open the /metrics endpoint. If the api-key is configured, it will cause problems in obtaining monitoring data.
Modifications
Similar to /health, exclude the /metrics endpoint from verifying the a

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR fixes issue #4589 where passing response_format=None to the chat completion API causes a validation error. After a recent update, the API stopped accepting None as a valid value for this parameter, despite it being the default. This breaks backward compatibility for existing appli

sglang.title: [Fix] Enhance DP Attention for IPv6 Compatibility
sglang.author: Lucius-THU
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When the enable-dp-attention flag is enabled along with an IPv6 dist_init_addr, an error zmq.error.ZMQError: No such device is encountered.
Modifications
To guarantee the correct operation of DP Attention within an IPv6 network environment (specifically when the dist_init_addr is in IPv6

sglang.title: Support o1 model on Azure
sglang.author: ChuyueSun
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Azure o1 model support is different from OpenAI o1 support.
AzureAI.model_name is user-defined. It does not necessarily reflect the model version. We need max_completion_tokens instead of max_tokens for o1.
Modifications
For now, I just check if the user says o1 in the user-defined user n

For the last chunk, send all remaining pages

Support prefill overlap

Ensure result is always ready before sending in chunked prefill to avoid race condition

sglang.title: [feature] enable pre compile jit deep_gemm
sglang.author: Alcanderian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Parallel JIT pre-compilation module for deep_gemm, scaning M from 1 to 65536.
Making deep_gemm not suck  the forward phase at all because it is called during the CUDA graph capture phase or initial request processing.
And then we can use deep_gemm everywhere! 🚀 🚀 🚀 🚀 🚀 🚀 🚀 🚀 🚀 🚀 🚀

Currently, sglang rocm uses vllm's RMSNorm and vllm's RMSNorm uses aiter's RMSNorm.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix distributed bug in Qwen2.5-VL & Qwen2.5-Omni
vllm.author: fyabc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes the distribution bug in Qwen2.5-VL & Qwen2.5-Omni (introduced in #15130).
When tp_group != world_size, current implementation will cause an allgather error.

vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks

vllm.author: fingertap

vllm.title: [Misc] fix collect_env version parse
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The version parse in collect_env.py is not correct. The __version_tuple__ from setuptools_scm is a tuple like
(0,8,1), (0,8,1,dev86,ge588ac237) or (0,8,1,dev86,ge588ac237+d20250321).  The length will never be 4. See: https://setuptools-scm.readthedocs.io/en/stable/usage/ which the length is not limi

vllm.title: [Misc] Refactor platform to get device specific stream and event
vllm.author: shen-shanshan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
What does this PR do?
Add a __getitem__ method for Platform class.
When using cuda, current_platform.xxx is equal to torch.cuda.xxx, whereas when using npu, current_platform.xxx is equal to torch.npu.xxx. Thus, we do not need to abstract Stream or Event anymore.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix GLM rotary_dim issue and support v1
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #16904

Use partial_rotary_factor = 0.5 to make sure RoPE initialize properly instead of using post hacking
With this fix, GlmForCausalLM can work with v1 now.

vllm.title: Raise error for data-parallel with benchmark_throughput
vllm.author: kartikx
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Running benchmark_throughput with data parallel results in a hang. This PR raises an error if --data-parallel-size is passed in.
Based on discussions in #16222
This is my first PR to vLLM so please let me know if I should add any tests. Thanks!

vllm.title: [Core] Speed up decode by remove synchronizing operation in sampler
vllm.author: chanh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This code inside apply_penalties does advanced indexing on a tensor which triggers nonzero which requires a CPU sync currently with PyTorch.
With torch.cuda.set_sync_debug_mode("warn") PyTorch framework confirms this:
/home/coder/vllm/venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/cuda/__init__.py:1067: Us

vllm.author: NickLucche

Carrying on @mgoin work here #14254.
This PR pre-compiles the multimodal encoder for various mm items batch sizes. We're mostly concerned with LLava-style vision language models (fixed input resolution), but pre-compiling code is already considering other modalities (audio etc..). We're not addressi

vllm.title: [V1] V1 FlashInfer Attention
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Carrying on @aurickq work from here #14061. Thanks to @LucasWilkinson for helping debug qo_indptr issues.
There are some performance issues in the original PR due to using BatchPrefillWithPagedKVCacheWrapper for all prefill and decode tokens. This PR separates prefill and decode tokens in V1 using t

vllm.title: [TPU][V1] Enable Top-P
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow up to #15489.
This PR enables the work done #15736.
We split up the contribs to better monitor performance as described more in detail here #16268.
Here's the benchmark I ran on single chip with and without top-p:

Benchmark commands
MODEL=meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct
# Server
VLLM_XLA_CH

vllm.title: [ROCm] Add aiter tkw1 kernel for Llama4 fp8
vllm.author: kliuae
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR enables aiter's tkw1 quantized MoE kernel to improve inferencing performance of compressed tensor Llama4 quantized with FP8. We have also revamped the aiter's MoE kernel dispatching to automatically choose the suitable AITER Fused MoE kernel without needing to set flags for kernel selection.

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove the chunked prefill warning for LoRA
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Chunked prefill with LoRA for some time now, it's time to remove this warning.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Add expert_map support to Cutlass FP8 MOE
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Add expert_map support to Cutlass FP8 MOE

vllm.title: [V1] Remove additional_config check
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt: additional_config is contained in vllm_config and can be used by custom platform. It doesn't affect any V1 feature or function and can be used by V1 correctly. This PR drop the related check for V1 engine.

vllm.title: [Performance][ROCm] Add skinny gemms for unquantized linear on ROCm
vllm.author: charlifu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds skinny gemms for unquantized linear (bf16 and fp16) op on ROCm to achieve better performance when the batch size is  <= 2.




bs=2,in=32,out=128,tp=8
bs=1,in=32,out=128,tp=8




VLLM_USE_ROCM_SKINNY_GEMM=0
1.4460096444313726 seconds
1.4118467693217098 seconds


VLLM_USE_ROCM_SKINNY_GEM

vllm.title: Support S3 Sharded loading with RunAI Model Streamer
vllm.author: omer-dayan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In this PR we add support for using RunAI Model Streamer with sharded model files.
It allows the user to upload the sharded model files to S3:

and run this model using the following command:
vllm serve s3://core-llm/Llama-3-8b-4/ --tensor-parallel-size 4 --load-format runai_streamer_sharded
